title: Blackout Revival Tech Reborn
body:
**This mod is fully based of the roblox game Blackout Revival.**

This mod adds Items, Weapons, Armors and more that resemble those of Blackout Revival. Most of these items have a tech, future look and functionality to them. There are also new death mechanics, healing items, and more.

There are currently:
- 4 Armor sets
- 15 Weapons
- A lot of other Items.

Most of the weapons in this mod are firearms, and example is the KS-23: it's a shotgun that shoots with very low range but shoots immediately after right clicking and also does a high burst of damage. This mod also offers special weapons that are seen in Blackout Revival, that includes the Photon Accelerator, P90Z Leviathan's call and more.

The new armor sets: Commander and Operator give unique full set buffs and passives as well as commander having a life support system at half health. The life support system creates a sphere of smoke to dissorient your enemies and also gives resistance I for a few seconds. The operator passive is double jump.

Also this mod adds a new damage type called True damage which bypasses the downed effect basically killing you as if it was vanilla minecraft, but only few very powerful weapons can do this type of damage.
